title: Pity I Don't Have Perfect Pitch Too
original_title: Pity I Don't Have Perfect Pitch Too
overview: This Pitch Perfect spoof follows Wrecka as she joins the all-female acappella group, the "Musicats", against their rival, the "Melodogs".
